title: T-023 — QA-003b spec detail page (read-only, parity)
prompt:
# T-023 — QA-003b spec detail page

PRD: 09-QUALITY-PRD.md §8.3 QUA-102, §8.5 prototype spec_detail
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Build `/quality/specs/:id` Server Component showing read-only spec view: header, allergen profile snapshot, parameters table, regulation tags, signed banner (when active), Clone button, Approve action entry-point (under_review only).

## Implementation contract
1. `apps/web/src/app/quality/specs/[id]/page.tsx` reads getSpecDetail(id) returning header + parameters + allergen_profile.
2. Renders sections per prototype design/Monopilot Design System/quality/specs-screens.jsx:305-420 (spec_detail).
3. SignedBanner Card visible when status='active' showing approved_by, approved_at, signature_hash truncated to 16 chars.
4. Action buttons: Clone to new version (visible all roles), Approve (visible only when status='under_review' and role=quality_lead).

## Files
- apps/web/src/app/quality/specs/[id]/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/src/server/quality/getSpecDetail.ts [create]
- apps/web/src/components/quality/specs/SpecDetailView.tsx [create]
- apps/web/src/components/quality/specs/__tests__/SpecDetailView.test.tsx [create]
- design/Monopilot Design System/quality/specs-screens.jsx [ref]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the page renders, when compared to design/Monopilot Design System/quality/specs-screens.jsx:305-420, then it has parity with the prototype on structure (header card + allergen profile card + parameters table + regulation tags row + signed banner + footer action buttons in same order), visuals (shadcn Card/Table/Badge/Button only, signature_hash truncated to 16 chars in the banner), and interaction (Clone always visible, Approve visible only when status='under_review' and role=quality_lead) — verified by RTL plus parity checklist in pipeline_inputs.details
2. Given a spec with status='active', when the page renders, then all parameter inputs render as read-only (no editable Inputs in the parameter table)
3. Given a spec with status='under_review' and caller role=quality_lead, when the user clicks Approve, then the spec_sign_modal opens (T-024 dialog mounting)

pipeline_inputs.description: Spec detail read-only page: header, allergen snapshot, params, regulation tags, signed banner; parity with spec_detail prototype.
pipeline_inputs.details: Server Component reads getSpecDetail. Renders sections matching prototype specs-screens.jsx:305-420. Truncates signature_hash to 16 chars in the banner. Approve action conditional on status+role. Honor translation notes: read-only summary props, no local state for read-only display.
acceptance_criteria: Given the page renders, when compared to design/Monopilot Design System/quality/specs-screens.jsx:305-420, then it has parity on structure (header card + allergen profile card + parameters table + regulation tags + signed banner + footer actions in same order), visuals (shadcn Card/Table/Badge/Button only, signature_hash truncated to 16 chars), and interaction (Clone always visible, Approve visible only when status='under_review' AND role=quality_lead) — verified by RTL plus parity checklist in pipeline_inputs.details
Given a spec with status='active', when the page renders, then all parameter inputs are read-only (no editable Inputs)
Given a spec with status='under_review' and role=quality_lead, when the user clicks Approve, then the spec_sign_modal opens
test_strategy: RED: write apps/web/src/components/quality/specs/__tests__/SpecDetailView.test.tsx asserting structure, role-conditional Approve, signature truncation, read-only post-active
risk_red_lines: Do not show full signature_hash to non-admin callers
Do not render editable Inputs for active spec parameters
Do not show Approve button for non-quality_lead role
